summary: FPV drones struck a commuter train in the Kharkiv region on March 24, killing one person and injuring several others when the drone hit a carriage at Slatino station. Russian Ka-52 helicopter crew was eliminated near Nadiivka after a crash landing, with additional drones striking during the evacuation attempt. The "Rubicon" Center reported over 21,000 enemy target eliminations, with unmanned systems (UAVs and targeting complexes) accounting for 35.5% of destroyed targets. A rare Russian "Klin" drone with a 5 kg payload, 120 km range, and advanced Li-AFB battery was intercepted. Iranian-backed militia used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport.
